UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: N. Bautista ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Ben Patel is present. Represented by K. Miranda.
Plaintiff is in Pro Per.
Defendant Carl Hunter is present.
Attorney Aaron Morrison representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem J. Birkelund litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of AUG-26, 2013 is vacated. (D501)
